subject: Large grey cloth sack prominently displayed in foreground; a humanoid figure stands triumphantly behind it
description: The foreground is dominated by a large rounded grey cloth sack — the named item on the card. Behind it stands a humanoid figure in an orange gi with arms raised or posed triumphantly, conveying energy and excitement. The background is warm yellow-orange. The card is an Extra card type, and the art foregrounds the item rather than the figure. The sack is the compositional anchor; the figure behind it serves as the celebratory frame.
foreground: large grey cloth sack (senzu bean bag) dominating the lower foreground
background: warm yellow-orange, figure in orange gi with arms raised
emotion: triumphant and energetic; raised arms behind the prominent item
